temporal_description: (00:00-00:05) In a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with potion-making supplies, Harry Potter, wearing glasses and a brown corduroy shirt, looks up with a startled and fearful expression. The camera then cuts to a shot from behind a man in a green corduroy shirt, who is facing away from the camera, looking towards Harry. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere, immediately creating a sense of confrontation or discovery. Harry is clearly on edge, and the man in green is positioned as an imposing figure.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score plays, heightening the tension.)
